title: Rename warnings list component with approval and dismissal actions
purpose: Displays a list of rename warnings with options to approve or dismiss each warning individually or all at once.

steps.content: Initialize state for tracking busy individual warnings and bulk operations.
Define a handler for individual actions that updates busy state and calls the provided callback.
Define a handler for bulk approval that updates bulk busy state and calls the approve all callback.
Render empty message if no warnings are present.
Render header with warning count and bulk approve button.
Render list of warnings with metadata, messages, and suggestions.
Render action buttons for each warning to approve or dismiss.
Add the warning ID to the busy set to indicate it is being processed.
Execute the provided function with the warning as argument.
Remove the warning ID from the busy set after processing completes.
Set the bulk busy state to indicate the operation is in progress.
Call the approve all callback with the list of warnings.
Clear the bulk busy state after the operation completes.
